full_text:
Xiang Xiu 向秀
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiang Xiu (向秀)was born in He Nan [河南]. One of the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove. Accepted appointment after Ji Kang’s death. Xiang Xiu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Xiang Xiu lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
